Variables.Name: LayerName
Variables.Description:
Name of blend layer to paint when applying spline to landscape
	  If "none", no layer is painted

Variables.Name: bRaiseTerrain
Variables.Description: If the spline is above the terrain, whether to raise the terrain up to the level of the spline when applying it to the landscape.

Variables.Name: bLowerTerrain
Variables.Description: If the spline is below the terrain, whether to lower the terrain down to the level of the spline when applying it to the landscape.

Variables.Name: SplineMeshes
Variables.Description: Spline meshes from this list are used in random order along the spline.

Variables.Name: bEnableCollision
Variables.Description: Whether to generate collision for the Spline Meshes.

Variables.Name: bCastShadow
Variables.Description: Whether the Spline Meshes should cast a shadow.

Variables.Name: RandomSeed
Variables.Description: Random seed used for choosing which order to use spline meshes. Ignored if only one mesh is set.

Variables.Name: LDMaxDrawDistance
Variables.Description: Max draw distance for all the mesh pieces used in this spline

Variables.Name: TranslucencySortPriority
Variables.Description:
Translucent objects with a lower sort priority draw behind objects with a higher priority.
	  Translucent objects with the same priority are rendered from back-to-front based on their bounds origin.
	 
	  Ignored if the object is not translucent.  The default priority is zero.
	  Warning: This should never be set to a non-default value unless you know what you are doing, as it will prevent the renderer from sorting correctly.

Variables.Name: bPlaceSplineMeshesInStreamingLevels
Variables.Description: Whether spline meshes should be placed in landscape proxy streaming levels (true) or the spline's level (false)

Variables.Name: bRenderToTerrainVirtualTexture
Variables.Description: This spline will be rendered to terrain VT if true

Variables.Name: TerrainRVTRenderSortPriority
Variables.Description:
Objects with a lower sort priority draw behind objects with a higher priority.
	  Objects with the same priority are rendered from back-to-front based on their bounds origin.

Variables.Name: ForeignWorlds
Variables.Description: World references for mesh components stored in other streaming levels

Variables.Name: ModificationKey
Variables.Description: Key for tracking whether this segment has been modified relative to the mesh components stored in other streaming levels
